basics.name: Vincess Dongmo
basics.summary: Machine Learning researcher with interdisciplinary training in Physics and Artificial Intelligence, focusing on scientific AI systems for biomedical imaging, biosensing, and large-scale spatiotemporal modeling.

work.summary: Leading data and analytics workstream for NextGen, a large-scale migration of the Orange Money platform from Tango to Huawei Mobile Money (HMM).
highlights: Designed and governed end-to-end data migration strategies ensuring data integrity, consistency, and regulatory compliance
Defined data models, transformation rules, and reconciliation frameworks for customer, transaction, wallet, and settlement data
Developed data quality controls, validation pipelines, and anomaly detection mechanisms for high-volume financial data
Provided technical leadership on data architecture, analytics, and decision-support use cases

work.summary: Built GPU-accelerated recommender systems and multi-agent ML pipelines for a sports betting platform.
highlights: Built GPU-accelerated recommender systems using NVIDIA Merlin delivering personalised event and odds recommendations in real time
Architected end-to-end ML pipeline: data ingestion, feature engineering, model training, deployment, and real-time inference
Designed multi-agent systems to optimise live betting decision-making via real-time analytics and predictive modelling
Led cross-functional team of 2 Data Scientists; established best practices for model deployment and CI/CD pipelines

work.position: Machine Learning Engineer — Public Procurement Fraud Detection
work.summary: Designed and deployed GNN models to identify collusive bidding and anomalies in Cameroon's public procurement system.
highlights: Designed and deployed GNN models (GCN, GAT, R-GCN) to identify collusive bidding and anomalies in public procurement
Modelled heterogeneous graphs with nodes representing suppliers, contracts, and government agencies
Built robust ETL pipelines integrating ePPP, CPPA, and corporate registry data; performed entity resolution on 30%+ missing data
Collaborated with Cameroon's Supreme Audit Institution to co-design an AI-driven auditing assistant

work.position: Lead Machine Learning & Computer Vision Engineer
work.summary: Led development of deep learning systems for real-time video analysis and autonomous drone delivery.
highlights: Led development of deep learning framework enabling real-time video stream analysis; improved surveillance capabilities by 40%
Deployed production system handling 1,000 requests/second with <100ms response time using Docker and Kubernetes
Engineered autonomous drone delivery system with advanced computer vision navigation; reduced delivery times by 30%
Established CI/CD pipelines for ML model deployment; mentored junior developers and data scientists

education.institution: National Advanced School of Engineering of Yaoundé (ENSPY)
education.area: Computer Engineering — Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning

publications.name: Leveraging Machine Learning for Enhanced Financial Inclusion: Revolutionizing Agricultural Banking in Central Africa
publications.summary: Proposed a credit scoring model using alternative data (mobile money transactions, crop yields, weather, demographics) for rural farmers in Central Africa. Compared ML approaches against logistic regression baselines; demonstrated significantly higher loan approval rates, lower default risk, and improved operational efficiency.
